title: 🏷️ VIDEO
data_structure:
```json
[
  {
    "name": "video_provider",
    "mandatory": true,
    "readonly": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "youtube"
  },
  {
    "name": "external_id",
    "mandatory": true,
    "readonly": false,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "NqsBncRslsg"
  },
  {
    "name": "title",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "P1 vs F40"
  },
  {
    "name": "description",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "Drag Race - P1 vs F40"
  },
  {
    "name": "creator",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "Lovecars"
  },
  {
    "name": "license",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "youtube"
  },
  {
    "name": "tags",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "F40, P1"
  },
  {
    "name": "source",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NqsBncRslsg"
  },
  {
    "name": "duration",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "PT7M24S"
  },
  {
    "name": "thumbnail_url_l",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/maxresdefault.jpg"
  },
  {
    "name": "thumbnail_url_m",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/sddefault.jpg"
  },
  {
    "name": "thumbnail_url_s",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/mqdefault.jpg"
  },
  {
    "name": "thumbnail_url_xs",
    "mandatory": false,
    "readonly": true,
    "datatype": "string",
    "example": "https://i.ytimg.com/vi/NqsBncRslsg/default.jpg"
  }
]
```
